module_info.docstring: Structural tidy for auto-memory files — section extraction and stale count detection.

classes.name: Extraction
classes.docstring: A section to be extracted to a topic file.

classes.name: StaleCount
classes.docstring: A detected count pattern that may be stale.

classes.name: _Section
classes.docstring: Internal: a parsed section of MEMORY.md.

functions.name: _slugify
functions.docstring: Convert a section name to a filename-safe slug.

functions.name: _build_topic_link
functions.docstring: Build a markdown link for the Topic Files section.

functions.name: tidy_memory
functions.docstring:
Tidy MEMORY.md by extracting oversized sections to topic files.

Args:
    memory_dir: Path to the auto-memory directory
    budget: Maximum line count for MEMORY.md
    section_threshold: Minimum section size to consider for extraction
    apply: If True, write changes. If False, dry-run only.

Returns:
    TidyResult with extraction details and projected line count.

functions.name: _rewrite_memory_file
functions.docstring: Rewrite MEMORY.md with extracted sections replaced by topic links.

functions.name: detect_stale_counts
functions.docstring:
Scan memory files for point-in-time count patterns that may be stale.

Checks all .md files in memory_dir for patterns like "48 plugins".
For counts that reference countable directories (relative to project_dir),
resolves the actual count.

Args:
    memory_dir: Path to the auto-memory directory
    project_dir: Project root for resolving countable paths. If None, counts
                 are flagged but not verified.

Returns:
    List of StaleCount instances.

functions.name: _try_count
functions.docstring:
Try to verify a count by checking the filesystem.

Returns the actual count if verifiable, None otherwise.
